recommendations.title: Baby Mama
recommendations.overview: A successful, single businesswoman who dreams of having a baby discovers she is infertile and hires a working class woman to be her unlikely surrogate.

recommendations.title: Return to Never Land
recommendations.overview: In 1940, the world is besieged by World War II. Wendy, all grown up, has two children; including Jane, who does not believe Wendy's stories about Peter Pan.

recommendations.title: Escape from Tomorrow
recommendations.genres: Horror, Fantasy, Comedy, Drama, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: In a world of fake castles and anthropomorphic rodents, an epic battle begins when an unemployed father's sanity is challenged by a chance encounter with two underage girls on holiday.

recommendations.title: Jakob's Wife
recommendations.overview: After a chance encounter with "The Master", Anne discovers bite marks on her neck, a new sense of power, and an appetite to live bigger and bolder than ever.

recommendations.title: Code Name: Emperor
recommendations.overview: Juan, a secret service agent, approaches Wendy, a young Filipina who works as a maid for a suspicious couple.

recommendations.title: Wendy
recommendations.overview: A re-imagining of "Peter Pan" from the point of view of Wendy Darling, who finds herself lost on a mysterious island where aging and time have come unglued. She must fight to save her family, her freedom and the joyous spirit of youth.

recommendations.title: Virgin Mountain
recommendations.overview: Fúsi finds comfort in the familiarity of his routines, until an involuntary dance class forces him to encounter the real world.

recommendations.title: Eyes Wide Shut
recommendations.overview: After Dr. Bill Harford's wife, Alice, admits to having sexual fantasies about a man she met, Bill becomes obsessed with having a sexual encounter. He discovers an underground sexual group and attends one of their meetings -- and quickly discovers tha

recommendations.title: The Door
recommendations.overview: A successful artist loses control of his life after his young daughter's death. A chance for a new start appears, but all is not what it seems.

recommendations.title: Reinventing Marvin
recommendations.overview: Telling the true story of Marvin Bijou, a young boy from a working-class family in a small village, who suffers constant bullying at school and home for being ‘different’ – too sensitive and too feminine. A chance encounter with a drama teacher opens
